items.title: U.S. bombs Iranian military sites and downs missiles Tehran fired at troops in Kuwait
items.desc: The United States said Monday that it bombed radar and drone sites in Iran after Tehran shot down an American drone over the weekend. Iran then said it targeted American soldiers in Kuwait with missiles, which the U.S. says it shot down.
